{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Tarik
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tarik]] is a character who experienced terror while running through the mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c1">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Tarik]] is a cultist who was abducted by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
